title: minimal design
body:
welcome to a guitar suite, human - a no fluff, no ads, no bs, handy toolkit for intermediate guitarists

it started as a project for quick reference to titles i have less memorized, but also to structure and develop musical knowledge. all in minimal style

its a work in progress, and maintaining a website is another challenge. if you found it useful or have any comments feel free to reach out

magicsoultravel@proton.me

perhaps you may even consider supporting hosting costs or raising a brew: paypal will be here one day

development paused - v2 overhaul coming soon!
